release_notes: Fixes the PDF export crash on clean Macs. 1.0.8 bundled the right libraries but a version mismatch underneath still hard-crashed the app on first PDF export — 1.0.9 unifies the bundled font-shaping libraries and ships its own Inter + JetBrains Mono fonts so PDFs render the same on every machine. PDF rendering is now isolated in a worker process, so any future native crash becomes a graceful 'PDF export failed' instead of taking the app down. Brighter gray body text in the app and PDF reports.
